Waf build system components, tools, extensions, and utilities for compiler integration, task management, and error handling.

## Folders
- **[extras](extras/README.md)**: Waf build system extensions for compiler integration, build tools, language support, and task management.
- **[Tools](Tools/README.md)**: Tools for configuring and integrating various compilers, languages, and build systems in the Waf environment.

## Files
- **[__init__.py](__init__.py.md)**: Initialization file for the waflib module in the pebble-firmware SDK.
- **[ansiterm.py](ansiterm.py.md)**: Emulates a vt100 terminal in cmd.exe by interpreting vt100 escape characters using Win32 console commands.
- **[Build.py](Build.py.md)**: Classes and methods for managing build processes, including building, cleaning, installing, and handling task dependencies.
- **[ConfigSet.py](ConfigSet.py.md)**: A copy-on-write dictionary class with serialization, attribute access, and transactional semantics.
- **[Configure.py](Configure.py.md)**: Implements a configuration system for the Waf build tool, including environment setup and program detection.
- **[Context.py](Context.py.md)**: Classes and functions for enabling and managing the command system in the Waf build automation tool.
- **[Errors.py](Errors.py.md)**: Defines custom exception classes for handling errors in the Waf build system.
- **[fixpy2.py](fixpy2.py.md)**: Modifies Python 2 code in Waf folders by applying specific text substitutions to files.
- **[Logs.py](Logs.py.md)**: Logging utilities for handling colored output, terminal width, and pretty-printing in the Waf build system.
- **[Node.py](Node.py.md)**: Defines a `Node` class for representing filesystem structures, with methods for file operations, serialization, and pattern-based file searching.
- **[Options.py](Options.py.md)**: Support for Waf command-line options, including parsing, managing, and executing user-provided options and commands.
- **[processor.py](processor.py.md)**: A script to execute subprocesses with error handling and communication through base64-encoded pickled data.
- **[Runner.py](Runner.py.md)**: Task scheduling and execution system for managing parallel task processing with priority handling and error management.
- **[Scripting.py](Scripting.py.md)**: Module for configuring, compiling, and installing targets using the Waf build system.
- **[Task.py](Task.py.md)**: Defines task management for atomic operations, including task states, execution, and constraints in the Waf build system.
- **[TaskGen.py](TaskGen.py.md)**: Encapsulates the creation and management of task objects in the Waf build system, including task generation, method execution order, and file processing by extension.
- **[Utils.py](Utils.py.md)**: Utilities and platform-specific fixes for consistent Waf API behavior across Python versions and platforms.
